jstats 0.9.93
  • Reference

Internal helper: expand a single registration into dummy columns

dot-jst_expand_one_dummy.Rd

Given a registration-shaped object (from jdummy storage or built in-flight via .jst_make_dummy_names()), add the dummy columns to data and replace var_name with the dummy names in formula_str. Used by .jst_expand_dummies() and by the auto-categorical pathways in jlm and jlogistic.

Usage

.jst_expand_one_dummy(data, formula_str, reg)

Arguments

data

The data frame.

formula_str

The formula as a deparsed string.

reg

A registration object (must have var_name, codes, non_ref_idx, dummy_names).

Value

A list with components data, formula_str, dummy_coef_names.

On this page
